iotwireless.partneraccount.sidewalkaccou.Docs: The Sidewalk application server private key. The application server private key is a secret key, which you should handle in a similar way as you would an application password. You can protect the application server private key by storing the value in the AWS Secrets Manager and use the [secretsmanager](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AWSCloudFormation/latest/UserGuide/dynamic-references.html#dynamic-references-secretsmanager) to reference this value.
